Name: UPawnAction
Description:
Things to remember:
 	 Actions are created paused

Variables.Name: ChildAction
Variables.Description: Current child node executing on top of this Action

Variables.Name: OwnerComponent
Variables.Description: Extra reference to the component this action is being governed by

Variables.Name: Instigator
Variables.Description:
indicates an object that caused this action. Used for mass removal of actions 
	 	by specific object

Variables.Name: BrainComp
Variables.Description: @Note: THIS IS HERE _ONLY_ BECAUSE OF THE WAY AI MESSAGING IS CURRENTLY IMPLEMENTED. WILL GO AWAY!

Variables.Name: bAllowNewSameClassInstance
Variables.Description:
if this is FALSE and we're trying to push a new instance of a given class,
	 	but the top of the stack is already an instance of that class ignore the attempted push

Variables.Name: bReplaceActiveSameClassInstance
Variables.Description:
if this is TRUE, when we try to push a new instance of an action who has the
	 	same class as the action on the top of the stack, pop the one on the stack, and push the new one
	 	NOTE: This trumps bAllowNewClassInstance (e.g. if this is true and bAllowNewClassInstance
	 	is false the active instance will still be replaced)

Variables.Name: bShouldPauseMovement
bAlwaysNotifyOnFinished
Variables.Description: if set, action will call OnFinished notify even when ending as FailedToStart
